summary: Iteration 102: BEO Orchestration Engine. Backend: 29/29 tests PASSED (100%). Full BEO lifecycle working: Prospect→Sales Cycle→BEO with sequential numbering (7001+)→Cascading notifications (6 departments)→Recipes with auto-costing→Menu sections→BEO costing→Fire guide→Credits→Satisfaction→Analytics. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in satisfaction recording.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: guest_satisfaction._id was being embedded in BEO documents causing JSON serialization error on GET /api/beo-engine/beos
Cascading notifications trigger 6 departments: calendar, engineering (HVAC + room check), housekeeping, banquet_setup, stewarding, finance
Equipment pull sheet generates 14 items for setup_type='Existing'
Recipe auto-costing calculates total_cost and cost_per_portion from ingredients
BEO costing applies 26% service charge and 7% tax correctly
Fire guide sorts items by fire_at time (earliest first)
Menu analytics classifies items as star/plowhorse/puzzle/dog based on popularity and margin
seed_data_creation: Test creates prospects, BEOs, recipes, menu sections, credits, satisfaction scores in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 102 tested BEO Orchestration Engine. All 17 endpoints working. Fixed ObjectId serialization bug in satisfaction recording (line 472 of beo_orchestration.py - moved score.pop('_id') before update_one). Regression tests for ops-pulse (12 departments) and financial-ops (7-step lifecycle) both passing.

prospect_lifecycle: POST /api/beo-engine/prospect - creates prospect with calendar holds - PASSED
beo_creation: POST /api/beo-engine/beo - creates BEO with sequential number (7001+) - PASSED
GET /api/beo-engine/beos - lists all BEOs - PASSED (after fix)
recipe_management: POST /api/beo-engine/recipe - creates bakery recipe with auto-costing - PASSED
POST /api/beo-engine/recipe - creates hot station recipe - PASSED
POST /api/beo-engine/recipe - creates cold station recipe - PASSED
GET /api/beo-engine/recipes - lists all recipes with costs - PASSED
beo_costing: POST /api/beo-engine/beo/{id}/cost - auto-costs BEO with food/bev/service/tax - PASSED
fire_guide: GET /api/beo-engine/beo/{id}/fire-guide - generates sorted fire time guide - PASSED
credits_satisfaction: POST /api/beo-engine/beo/{id}/credit - applies credit to BEO - PASSED
analytics: GET /api/beo-engine/master-accounts - grouped revenue by master account - PASSED
sequential_numbering: POST /api/beo-engine/beo - second BEO has incremented number - PASSED

bug_fixed.root_cause: MongoDB ObjectId in nested guest_satisfaction field was not JSON serializable
bug_fixed.fix: Moved score.pop('_id', None) before db.update_one() in record_satisfaction function (line 472)
bug_fixed.data_cleanup: Removed _id from 2 existing BEO documents with bad guest_satisfaction
